---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Core Idea**
A clear and concise description of the feature you want to add.

**The Problem**
What is currently difficult or impossible to do without this feature?

**Proposed Solution**
Describe how you imagine this working (UI changes, new tools, etc.).

**Additional Context**
Any mockups, screenshots, or examples from other apps that show how this could look.
